title: Dengue fever in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania: clinical features and outcome in populations of black and non-black racial category
author: Boillat-Blanco, Noémie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Adults with confirmed dengue (NS1 and/or IgM on rapid diagnostic test and/or PCR positive) were included between December 2013 and July 2014 in outpatient clinics in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania. Seven-day outcome was assessed by a visit or a call. 

 Available data include demographic characteristics, comorbidities, race and clinical presentation, including warning signs.
